verdicts.note: Tax stewardship concerns administration of revenue but does not establish whether she would cut, hold, or expand taxes.
Municipal finance-director service provides substantial institutional experience, balanced by no elected county-commission tenure.
A private agricultural-business background supports renewal but supplies meaningful management experience, making the maximal outsider pole too strong.
School-board service is an elected governing record, though not county-commission tenure.
School-board service and administrative consulting provide an elected and professional record, though not county-commission tenure.

review_notes: All 7 original scored pairs were reviewed exactly once (1 refuted, 2 upheld, 4 adjust). No omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier evidence for a supported missing proposal.
